column1: ドアが開くや否や、子供たちが飛び出した。
column2: どあがひらくやいなや、こどもたちがとびだした。
column3: No sooner had the door opened than the children rushed out.
column6: literary: two events with virtually no time gap
column8: が早いか = similar but even more literary; たとたん = more colloquial
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 彼女の言葉を聞くや否や、彼は立ち上がった。
column2: かのじょのことばをきくやいなや、かれはたちあがった。
column3: No sooner had he heard her words than he stood up.
column6: literary: almost simultaneous response to a stimulus
column8: や否や implies no deliberation between trigger and response
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 試合終了の笛が鳴るや否や、選手たちは抱き合った。
column2: しあいしゅうりょうのふえがなるやいなや、せんしゅたちはだきあった。
column3: No sooner had the final whistle blown than the players embraced.
column6: literary: automatic response immediately following an event
column8: や否や common in narrative/sports reporting
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:low complexity:standard

column1: 彼はベッドに横になるや否や眠ってしまった。
column2: かれはべっどによこになるやいなやねむってしまった。
column3: No sooner had he lain down on the bed than he fell asleep.
column5: V-dict + や否や + てしまった
column6: almost simultaneous with the trigger action; sleep came instantly
column8: や否や with てしまった emphasises the uncontrollable speed
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 知らせを受け取るや否や、彼女は病院に向かった。
column2: しらせをうけとるやいなや、かのじょはびょういんにむかった。
column3: No sooner had she received the news than she headed to the hospital.
column6: urgent movement triggered the instant a stimulus occurs
column8: や否や + movement verb = classic narrative sequence
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard

column1: 名前を呼ばれるや否や、彼は手を挙げた。
column2: なまえをよばれるやいなや、かれはてをあげた。
column3: The moment his name was called, he raised his hand.
column6: immediate reflexive response to being called; literary
column8: や否や can take passive trigger verbs (呼ばれる etc.)
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:や否や complexity:advanced frequency:top10k source:shin-kanzen source:authored complexity:standard
